login.title: Sign in to WebCasa
login.subtitle: Lightweight Caddy management panel
login.setup_hint: This is your first time using WebCasa. Please create an admin account.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your Caddy server and hosted sites

host.title: Host Management
host.subtitle: Manage reverse proxies, redirects and static sites
host.static_root_hint: Absolute path to the directory to serve static files from
host.php_root_hint: Absolute path to the PHP application root directory
host.php_fastcgi_hint: FastCGI address for PHP processing, e.g. localhost:9000 or unix//run/php-fpm.sock
host.directory_browse_hint: Allow users to browse directory listings when no index file is present
host.index_files_hint: Space-separated list of index file names
host.tls_mode_hint: Choose how TLS certificates are obtained
host.dns_provider_hint: Required for Wildcard or internal DNS challenge
host.dns_record_hint: Please point your domain to the server IP first
host.no_cert_hint: No certificates uploaded yet. Upload one below or go to Certificates page.
host.upload_cert_hint: Or upload a new certificate now
host.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete host "{{domain}}"?
host.redirect_url_hint: The original URI path will be appended automatically
host.http_redirect_hint: Automatically redirect HTTP requests to HTTPS
host.websocket_hint: Enable WebSocket proxying for real-time connections
host.error_page_hint: Directory containing custom HTML error pages (e.g. 404.html, 500.html)
host.custom_directives_hint: Additional Caddyfile directives injected into this site block
host.no_auth_hint: No credentials set — host is publicly accessible
host.existing_auth_hint: {{count}} existing credential(s). Add new ones to replace, or leave empty to keep current.

dns.subtitle: Manage DNS API providers for certificates DNS challenge

dns.dialog_description: Configure DNS API credentials for certificate DNS challenge verification
dns.confirm_delete_desc: Deleting this provider will prevent sites using it from renewing their certificates. Are you sure?
dns.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete provider "{{name}}"?

cert.title: Certificates
cert.subtitle: Manage SSL/TLS certificates for your hosts
cert.upload_description: Upload SSL certificate and private key files in PEM format. Domain and expiration will be parsed automatically.
cert.name: Certificate Name
cert.no_certs_hint: No certificates yet. Click 'Upload Certificate' above to add.
cert.confirm_delete_desc: Are you sure you want to delete certificate {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.

user.title: User Management
user.subtitle: Manage panel users and roles
user.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete user "{{username}}"?
user.new_password_hint: New Password (leave blank to keep current)

audit.title: Audit Logs
audit.subtitle: View operation history and security events

log.title: Logs
log.subtitle: View Caddy access and error logs

editor.title: Caddyfile Editor
editor.subtitle: Edit Caddyfile configuration directly

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage server, users, plugins, and panel configuration
settings.auto_reload_hint: Automatically reload Caddy after adding/modifying/deleting sites. If off, you must click Reload manually.
settings.auto_reload_callout: Caddy Server starts automatically with the panel. If auto-reload is enabled, Caddy will also start if it's not running.
settings.server_ip_hint: Detected automatically during installation. Users are prompted to point domains to these IPs.
settings.no_caddyfile_hint: No Caddyfile generated yet. Add a proxy host first.
settings.import_export_hint: Export your entire configuration as JSON, or import from a previous backup.
settings.import_warning: Importing will replace all existing host configurations. Make sure to export a backup first.

twofa.verify_hint: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app

twofa.enter_code: Enter the code from your app to confirm
twofa.disable_confirm: Enter your current TOTP code to disable 2FA
twofa.recovery_codes_hint: Save these recovery codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once.
twofa.recovery_codes_warning: These codes will not be shown again!

deploy.title: Project Deploy
deploy.subtitle: Manage and deploy source code projects
deploy.no_projects: No projects yet. Create one to deploy your first app.
deploy.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this project? All build data will be removed.
deploy.deploy_key_hint: Required for private repositories using SSH
deploy.deploy_key_encrypted: Deploy keys are encrypted at rest for security.
deploy.github_app_hint: GitHub App authentication provides fine-grained access control. You need to create a GitHub App and install it on your repository.
deploy.github_private_key_hint: The RSA private key generated for your GitHub App. Will be encrypted at rest.
deploy.domain_hint: Optional. A reverse proxy will be created automatically.
deploy.name_url_required: Project name and Git URL are required
deploy.env_rebuild_hint: Changes take effect on the next build
deploy.webhook_hint: Add this URL to your Git repository's webhook settings to trigger auto-deploy on push.

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.preset_hint: Click a provider to auto-fill configuration. You can also configure manually below.
ai.api_format_hint: Choose the API format matching your provider. Most OpenAI-compatible providers use 'OpenAI Chat Completions'.
ai.base_url_hint: API endpoint URL for your chosen provider
ai.api_key_hint: Your API key will be encrypted and stored securely
ai.model_hint: Select from presets or enter a custom model name
ai.connection_ok: Connection successful! AI is ready to use.
ai.not_configured: AI assistant is not configured yet. Set up your API key to get started.
ai.start_hint: Type a message below to start chatting
ai.error_response: Failed to get response. Please check your AI configuration.
ai.compose_placeholder: Describe your application (e.g. 'WordPress with MySQL and Redis')

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.description: Manage installed plugins. Enable or disable plugins to extend panel functionality. Changes take effect after restart.
plugins.page_description: Install, uninstall, and manage plugins to extend Web.Casa functionality.

plugins.restart_required: Restart required for changes to take effect
